data.description: US indices slightly down in premarket trading on Mon amid mixed global trade. Key economic indicators & inflation data in focus this week. Tech stocks surged, while energy & healthcare lagged. Strong jobs report boosted market sentiment.

data.title: Lundin Exits Europe For $1.5 Billion, Turns Focus To South America
data.description: Lundin Mining sells European mines to Boliden for up to $1.52B, focuses on South America. Neves-Corvo and Zinkgruvan boost Boliden's zinc production.
